1F · General At-Bat

The Vitality of a Swing

The refreshing trajectory of a swing and its details create the vitality of the space.

Rows of tour-grade bays run the length of the first floor, each one a quiet capsule of focus.

Multi-sensor tracking reads ball and club on every swing, and an analysis system keeps the numbers honest, so practice here carries to the course.

Bays
Tour-grade simulator bays
Tracking
Multi-sensor ball and club data
Format
Solo practice and group play
Book a Bay
Deck render · replace with final photography

1F · Putting Zone

Sunlight Through a Forest

A vibrant space that flows like the sunlight through a forest.

A true-roll green under a botanical canopy, where filtered light falls as if through leaves.

Tables and perches along the edge keep the zone social: focused practice on the surface, easy conversation around it.

Surface
True-roll practice green
Setting
Botanical canopy, filtered light
Use
Short game and social practice
Book a Bay
Deck render · replace with final photography

1F · Fitting Shop

Balance and Proportion

A space designed exclusively for individuals, where balance and proportion converge.

An enclosed capsule bay, built for one player at a time and the equipment that fits them alone.

Full club fitting and gapping, verified on the launch monitor and finished with a specification you can carry to the pro shop next door.

Studio
Enclosed capsule fitting bay
Service
Full fitting and gapping
Data
Launch monitor verified
Enquire
Deck render · replace with final photography

1F · Pro Shop

Movements That Draw the Gaze

The delicate movements of a vitalizing breeze become a patterned object overhead.

A champagne lattice of shelves beneath a ceiling that moves like the wind that shaped the building.

Clubs, apparel, and accessories curated for the club, with member sourcing available on request.

Range
Clubs, apparel, accessories
Setting
Champagne lattice display
Service
Member sourcing on request
Visit the shop
Deck render · replace with final photography

1F · Sauna

Breathing Alongside Nature

The essence of harmony, a warm cedar calm for the hour after the round.

A dry cedar sauna, warm and quiet, where the day settles before you step back out.

Shower and powder rooms sit alongside, so the visit ends as composed as it began.

Type
Dry cedar sauna
Adjacent
Shower and powder rooms
Access
Included with play
Deck renders · Toilet W · Toilet M · Shower · Powder Room

1F · Amenities

Harmony in the Details

Meticulous attention to detail, even in the spaces you only pass through.

The standard of the club holds everywhere, including the rooms most places overlook.

Toilet W and M, a shower room, and a powder room, each finished with the same materials and light as the floors they serve.

Rooms
Toilet W and M, shower, powder room
Floor
1F, beside the sauna
Deck render · replace with restaurant photography

1F · Dining

Warm Sunshine on the Western River

Everyday and togetherness, gathered under soothing waves of light.

Crystal Jade Palace

Cantonese fine dining,
on the promenade.

The dining room belongs to Crystal Jade Palace, the first in North America, led by a Michelin-starred kitchen. Its full story, menu, and reservations live on its own page.

Crystal Jade Palace Book a Table
Deck render · replace with final photography

2F · Private Area

Iconic 15

Fifteen imaginary landscapes infused with the physical properties of nature.

Iconic 15 is the private second floor: fifteen VIP rooms, each translating a property of nature into a room-scale landscape.

Sprout, grain, leaf, and crystal. The motifs shift from room to room, so no two evenings read the same, and every room carries a full simulator of its own.

Rooms
Fifteen on the second floor
Motifs
Sprout, grain, leaf, crystal
Booking
By the room, hourly

2F · Private Area

Beyond the Fifteen

Four singular suites, reserved for the few.

Above the fifteen sit four VVIP suites, each a singular commission with a design of its own.

Their interiors are held back for now and will be revealed to members first.

Suites
Four, all different
Status
Designs to be revealed
